message:
🐛 Fix remaining kc-agent CORS and AI capability gaps (#10468)

* 🐛 Fix kc-agent CORS, SSE stream, and AI capability messaging (Fixes #10461, Fixes #10462, Fixes #10463)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix remaining kc-agent CORS and AI capability gaps (Fixes #10461, Fixes #10462, Fixes #10463)

- Add Access-Control-Allow-Credentials to cancel-chat HTTP endpoint
- Apply ChatOnlySystemPrompt to non-streaming chat path (handleChatMessage)
  so chat-only providers never promise command execution in either path

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
